findings.impact: An adapter manifest fails adapter.schema.json validation.
findings.title: Adapter Manifest Schema: schema validation failed

findings.impact: An adapter manifest fails adapter.schema.json validation.
findings.title: Adapter Manifest Schema: schema validation failed

evidence.value: Rules namespace ownership: adapters/targets/omnia/rules/frame-misplaced.md — FRAME-* ids are reserved for framework-repo declarative rules and may not be placed under adapter trees (got 'FRAME-001' under rules owner 'omnia')

findings.impact: A rule's id-namespace prefix is not owned by the rules directory it lives under, so the codex namespace ownership invariant is broken.
findings.remediation: Move the rule into the directory that owns its namespace prefix, or renumber the id to the prefix its current directory owns.
findings.title: Rules namespace ownership: adapters/targets/omnia/rules/frame-misplaced.md — FRAME-* ids are reserved for framework-repo declarative rules and may not be placed under adapter trees (got 'FRAME-001' under rules owner 'omnia')
